## Summary

Describe the change clearly and concisely.

## Why

Explain the problem this solves or the reason for the change.

## Scope

- [ ] Python daemon
- [ ] Controller/input handling
- [ ] Action scripts
- [ ] Steam runner image
- [ ] Host-side mode
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] CI / release automation
- [ ] Other

## Testing

Describe what you tested and how.

- [ ] Not run (explain below)
- [ ] Manual testing completed
- [ ] `make verify` passed
- [ ] `make format` run, if Python formatting changed
- [ ] Docker image build tested, if image files changed

## Related Issues

Link related issues, discussions, or follow-up work.

## Checklist

- [ ] PR title follows Conventional Commits
- [ ] Changes are focused and scoped to one logical change
- [ ] Documentation was updated if behavior changed
- [ ] Sensitive values, capture logs, hostnames, container IDs, and local-only
      artifacts were not committed
- [ ] Anti-cheat or safety implications were documented when input/process
      behavior changed

## Notes

Add rollout notes, migration concerns, screenshots, or anything reviewers
should know.
